vocabulary.example: The final review found that channel bandwidth measurement was consistently documented.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 最終審查確認通道頻寬量測已有一致的文件紀錄。

vocabulary.example: The technical record includes objective evidence for modulation coding scheme measurement.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 技術紀錄包含調變編碼方案量測的客觀證據。

vocabulary.example: The customer requested a clear explanation of occupied bandwidth measurement.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 客戶要求清楚說明佔用頻寬量測。

vocabulary.example: The procedure defines the acceptance criterion for spectral mask measurement.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 程序定義了頻譜遮罩量測的接受準則。

vocabulary.example: The test plan identifies how error vector magnitude measurement will be controlled and recorded.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 測試計畫說明如何控制並記錄誤差向量幅度量測。

vocabulary.example: The project team discussed carrier frequency offset measurement during the pre-test meeting.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 專案團隊在測試前會議中討論了載波頻率偏移量測。

vocabulary.example: The assessor reviewed the traceable evidence supporting dynamic frequency selection measurement.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 評鑑人員審查了支持動態頻率選擇量測的可追溯證據。

vocabulary.example: The investigation separated observations about transmit power control measurement from working hypotheses.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 調查將發射功率控制量測的觀察結果與待驗證假設分開記錄。

vocabulary.example: The engineer explained why guard interval measurement was relevant to the compliance decision.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 工程師說明了保護間隔量測與符合性判定的關聯。

vocabulary.example: The technician verified aggregate frame measurement before connecting the sample.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 技術員在連接樣品前確認了聚合訊框量測。

common_sentences.english: Could you record modulation coding scheme measurement in the test log?
common_sentences.zh_tw: 可以請你把調變編碼方案量測記錄在測試日誌嗎？

common_sentences.english: The latest result indicates a change in occupied bandwidth measurement.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 最新結果顯示佔用頻寬量測有所變化。

common_sentences.english: Please keep spectral mask measurement unchanged during the comparison.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 進行比較時，請保持頻譜遮罩量測不變。

common_sentences.english: The team will repeat error vector magnitude measurement under the worst-case condition.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 團隊會在最嚴苛條件下重新執行誤差向量幅度量測。

common_sentences.english: The report clearly identifies the method used for carrier frequency offset measurement.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 報告已清楚標示載波頻率偏移量測所使用的方法。

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: I have verified channel bandwidth measurement and recorded the setup.
lines.zh_tw: 我已確認通道頻寬量測並記錄測試設定。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Good. What evidence supports the decision for modulation coding scheme measurement?
lines.zh_tw: 很好。有哪些證據支持對調變編碼方案量測的判定？

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: The calibrated result, uncertainty record, and setup photographs are linked in the test log.
lines.zh_tw: 校正後的結果、不確定度紀錄與測試設定照片都已連結於測試日誌。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Please confirm the acceptance criterion before releasing the report.
lines.zh_tw: 發布報告前，請確認接受準則。

debug_case.title: Surge fail — Wi-Fi investigation
debug_case.title_zh_tw: 雷擊突波測試失敗：Wi-Fi 測試調查
debug_case.problem: A pre-compliance check on Day 041 shows a repeatable surge fail condition.
debug_case.background: The Wi-Fi configuration was documented before the result was compared with the applicable criterion. This is a realistic training scenario; learners must distinguish observations from hypotheses.
possible_causes: The protection device clamping voltage is too high.
The surge return path has excessive inductance.
check_steps: Verify coupling mode, polarity, and phase angle.
Measure residual voltage at the protected circuit.
corrective_actions: Select a coordinated surge protection network.
Reduce loop area in the surge current path.
debug_case.supervisor_question: How would you prove the root cause before changing the Wi-Fi design?
debug_case.suggested_answer: I would first verify the setup and reproduce the result. Then I would isolate one variable at a time, record objective evidence, and repeat the measurement after the corrective action.

interview_question.question: Please introduce yourself as an RF compliance engineer. Connect your answer to Wi-Fi.
interview_question.hint_zh_tw: 請用專業經歷、核心能力與成果組成 60 秒自我介紹。 並連結到「Wi-Fi 測試」。
interview_question.sample_answer: I am an RF compliance engineer with hands-on experience in measurement, debugging, and certification. I communicate test evidence clearly and work across design, laboratory, and customer teams. In Wi-Fi, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
interview_question.natural_rewrite: A natural engineering answer uses a clear context, your specific action, objective evidence, and the resulting technical or business impact.

quiz.prompt: 「channel bandwidth measurement」的正確繁體中文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: channel bandwidth measurement 指的是「通道頻寬量測」。

quiz.prompt: 「調變編碼方案量測」的正確工程英文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: 工程文件中可使用 modulation coding scheme measurement。

quiz.prompt: The customer requested a clear explanation of ________.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 客戶要求清楚說明佔用頻寬量測。
quiz.explanation: 完整句子的關鍵詞是 occupied bandwidth measurement。

quiz.prompt: 播放語音後，選出你聽到的專業詞彙。
quiz.explanation: 播放內容是 spectral mask measurement（頻譜遮罩量測）。

quiz.prompt: Please introduce yourself as an RF compliance engineer. Connect your answer to Wi-Fi.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 請用專業經歷、核心能力與成果組成 60 秒自我介紹。 並連結到「Wi-Fi 測試」。
quiz.answer: I am an RF compliance engineer with hands-on experience in measurement, debugging, and certification. I communicate test evidence clearly and work across design, laboratory, and customer teams. In Wi-Fi, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
quiz.explanation: 回答應包含具體行動、工程證據與結果；系統採關鍵概念給分。
